hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.html$'; then djlint "$FILE" --reformat --profile=django 2>/dev/null; fi; fi; exit 0
